suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on testing inline page components (components defined within App.tsx or similar). ProfilePage is a page component defined in App.tsx and lacks dedicated unit tests - only integration/e2e coverage exists. Consider guidance on how to test these.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-profile-page-edit-mode: ProfilePage defined in src/App.tsx has no specific unit tests
